Command.help: Get CLI version
Get the memory pointer of specific op code
Get CLI descriptor buffer by offset and size
Get the size of the descriptor file
Get unique hash of the descriptor
Get pointer to descriptor location (0 - in case not exist in device)
Set Pen Id manually. 0 for automatic mode
Set 1 for run offset calculation logic (default), 0 to disable this logic
Get run offset calculation logic state (1 is enabled, 0 is disabled)
Get Pen edge threshold. PenState (0 - Hover, 1 - Ink), Axis, Position (0 - Start, 1 - End)
Set Pen edge threshold. PenState (0 - Hover, 1 - Ink), Axis, Position (0 - Start, 1 - End)
Get Hover height IIR factor. Entry
Set Hover height IIR factor. Entry, Factor
Get Hover height IIR threshold. Entry
Set Hover height IIR threshold. Entry, Threshold
Get virtual antennas' factor. HoverHeight (0 - low, 1 - medium, 2 - high), Axis, Position (0 - Start, 1 - End)
Set virtual antennas' factor. Factor, HoverHeight (0 - low, 1 - medium, 2 - high), Axis, Position (0 - Start, 1 - End)
For XgBoost projects only (UseXgboostCom value in the XML is '1') - Get if using XgBoost CoM (State is '1' - default) or LS (State is '0')
For XgBoost projects only (UseXgboostCom value in the XML is '1') - Set if to use XgBoost CoM (set State to '1' - default) or use LS (set State to '0')
Get tip edge COM border value (index: border coefficient index(4), feature(25))
Set tip edge COM border value (index: border coefficient index(4), feature(25))
Get pen energy penalty for border positions
Set pen energy penalty for border positions
Set is should send VVTool reports (supported by EOS only)
Get is should send VVTool reports (supported by EOS only)
Get panel offset by region in mm
Set panel offset by region in mm. Use Value=255 to invalidate values and reload values from storage
Set pen border palm rejection learn enabled/disabled
Get pen border palm rejection learn enabled/disabled
Set pen border palm rejection border logic enabled/disabled
Get pen border palm rejection border logic enabled/disabled
Set pen border palm rejection radial logic enabled/disabled
Get pen border palm rejection radial logic enabled/disabled
Set Hinge Angle
Get Hinge Angle
Set DisplayState bitmap (00 - both displays are off | 01 - Region0 display is on | 10 Region1 display is on | 11 both displays are on)
Get DisplayState bitmap (00 - both displays are off | 01 - Region0 display is on | 10 Region1 display is on | 11 both displays are on)
Set Stitching state (0 - off | 1 - on)
Get Stitching state (0 - off | 1 - on)
Set EOS tracelogging severity (0 - None | 1 - Critical | 2 - Error | 3 - Warning | 4 - Information (default) | 5 - Verbose)
Set EOS tracelogging severity (0 - None | 1 - Critical | 2 - Error | 3 - Warning | 4 - Information (default) | 5 - Verbose)
Get zero force InkToHover threshold in microns
Set zero force InkToHover threshold in microns
Get zero force HoverToInk threshold in microns
Set zero force HoverToInk threshold in microns
Get enable pen pressure state (0 = Pen pressure disabled, 1 = Pen pressure enabled)
Set enable pen pressure state (0 = Pen pressure disabled, 1 = Pen pressure enabled)
Resets Number of Touch Report
Gets Number of Touch Report
